productDisplayName: Estelle Women Gold Pendant with Chain
description: Style NoteStatement jewellery can stand out without an overdose of colour pop or gaudy beads. This neck piece from estelle is a testament to elegant statement jewellery. Don't forget to keep the rest of your accessories tonal!Warranty: 1 yearProduct DetailsSlender gold chain with a lobster clasp that has adjustable linksHas a circular pendant with white stone embellishments Material and care24 carat gold platedPewter base metalHigh quality imported Crystals/CZsWipe with a clean cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength of chain: 40 cm
